overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic streets of Saint Denis. The character passes horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians on a sunny day, then enters a narrow brick alleyway leading to a private courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic urban street with tram tracks and shopfronts

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street
character turns slightly to navigate around a pedestrian walking toward him

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt street past shops and a passing carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horse moving slowly past the character
man in white shirt and hat walking toward the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story historic brick buildings with wrought iron balconies and shop signs
metal tram tracks embedded in the dirt road running down the center
stack of wooden barrels outside a shopfront
wooden telephone poles with crossbars and wires lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit historic street with tram tracks, passing a horse-drawn carriage on the left. Two-story brick buildings with balconies line the right side, and pedestrians walk along the wooden sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street approaching an alley entrance

events.description: character turns left to continue down the street toward the brick archway

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward a narrow archway entrance between buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in a long dress walking along the sidewalk near the shops

entered.detail: brick archway leading to a narrow passage between buildings
empty wooden cart parked on the side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and continues walking down the street, passing a parked wooden cart. The street narrows as he approaches a brick archway entrance ahead, with historic buildings lining both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alleyway with archways and potted plants

events.description: character enters the brick archway from the sunlit street into the shaded alley
moving from the dark passage toward the brighter light of the courtyard exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow enclosed brick passage toward the courtyard

entered.detail: tall weathered brick walls forming a narrow passage with arched openings
large red tropical flowers in a planter along the wall
black wrought iron gate set into the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow brick alleyway through the archway, leaving the bright street behind. The passage is shaded and cool, with red flowering plants on the left and an iron gate on the right, leading toward a brighter opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: private courtyard garden with benches and potted plants

events.description: character emerges from the narrow alley into the open sunlit courtyard

agents.ego_description: entering the quiet courtyard and slowing to look around the garden space

entered.detail: wooden bench sitting against the courtyard wall under the shade
large potted ferns and tropical plants arranged around the courtyard
historic building with white balcony railings and laundry hanging overhead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the character enters a peaceful brick courtyard filled with potted plants and a wooden bench. A two-story building with white balconies overlooks the quiet garden space, creating a secluded urban oasis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, sunlit historic thoroughfare into a secluded and peaceful urban courtyard. It begins on a bright street with tram tracks and wooden sidewalks, passing a horse-drawn carriage and two-story brick buildings. As the character turns left, the wide road narrows past a parked wooden cart and leads directly toward a brick archway. The scene then shifts into a shaded, cool alleyway lined with red flowering plants and an iron gate, leaving the brightness of the main street behind. Finally, the camera emerges from the passage into a quiet brick courtyard filled with potted plants and a wooden bench beneath white balconies.
